raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, two unauthorized purchases were made on my Citi Best Buy card ending XXXX at the XXXX, IL Best Buy location. 

The first purchase was for {$3800.00}, and the second purchase was for {$2600.00}. Both were made within hours of each other. 

Upon my discovery, I filed a complaint about both purchases and received a letter as of XX/XX/year>XXXX  that they received my fraud claim. On XXXX XXXX, I received a letter that outlines the following : Here 's what you need to know Our decision was based, in part, on the following : You received benefit from the disputed charges made on this account. 
We've conducted our investigation using the information that you provided about the dispute. With the information we had, it wasn't enough to support your claim and resolve the dispute in your favor. 
As a result, we have re-billed your account and consider our investigation complete.
